subcodes.first_line: History is a record of incessant wars. There is not a spot on the globe that has not been crimsoned with the blood of men
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @growth of the Cause, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @war and peace
